description: Can create and update legacy manually-entered purchase orders while the transition flag is enabled
name: legacy_po_create_update

description: Allows assigning and using the `Corporate` branch for time, expense, and po entries
name: corporate_branch

description: Holders can approve purchase_orders records. payload contains a JSON object which will restrict the type of purchase_orders record that can be approved. Properties are "max_amount" (required, number) and "divisions" (not required, list of strings that are division ids)
name: po_approver

description: Can absorb (merge) many existing records in a collection to a single record to handle duplicates or dirty data
name: absorb

description: Holders can create revisions of a rate_sheets record (revision > 0). Holders may also change the rate_sheet value of a jobs record that has a non-blank rate_sheet value.
name: rate_sheet_revise

description: Can CRUD uncommitted time_amendments records and read committed ones
name: tame

description: Broad read-access to data for reporting
name: report

description: CRUD for time_entries, bundling time_sheets where records belong to the user
name: time

description: Business Development Leads. These are users that are branch managers or executives who can be responsible for business development with a client. Users with this claim can be assigned to the business_development_lead field of the clients collection
name: busdev

description: Can manage purchase orders (cancel active POs with no expenses, close active Cumulative/Recurring POs with committed expenses, convert active One-Time POs to Cumulative), create OnAccount expenses above the no-PO limit without a PO, create/update/delete vendors, and edit the outstanding_balance field on jobs
name: payables_admin

description: Can edit specific fields on admin_profiles records
name: hr
